name: schema-validation
scenario: Define schemas for common configuration variables: API_URL (url format, required), PORT (port format), ADMIN_EMAIL (email format), and API_KEY (custom regex pattern for 32+ alphanumeric chars). Set some valid values and validate them. Then set an invalid value and show how validation catches it.
success_criteria: Uses schema set command with --format flag
Defines at least 3 different format types (url, port, email)
Uses custom regex pattern with --pattern flag
Marks at least one variable as --required
Sets valid values and validates successfully
Demonstrates validation failure with invalid value
Uses validate --json to get structured validation results
